items.title: Critical Kirki flaw exploited to hijack WordPress admin accounts
items.description: Hackers are exploiting a critical privilege escalation vulnerability (CVE-2026-8206) in the Kirki plugin for WordPress to take over any user account, including those belonging to administrators. [...]
items.apex_ai_summary: [CRITICAL] Threat Intel advisory. Risk score 9.0/10. Full APEX AI analysis available to Pro subscribers.

title: SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-2425 hiWeb Migration Simple  2001 - Reflected Cross-Site Scripting via 
id: 0963c84f-9fa5-5700-83d6-e0b5ab54cb7c
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-2425 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: LOW | Class: XSS
references:

author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/03
modified: 2026/06/03
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: webserver
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        EventID:
            - 4625
            - 4648
            - 4728
        LogonType: 3
    condition: selection
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative access
    - Service account activity
level: low
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-2425 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-03T09:20:02Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-2425", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-2425 Exploitation Attempt - XSS"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:1999992; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-03, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)

author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering

modified: 2026/06/03
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: webserver
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        EventID:
            - 4625
            - 4648

items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2025-5085 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-03T09:20:02Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2025-5085", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
